text: Every risotto is a dish.
deviant is a synonym of deviate.
A lookout is also called a sentinel.
Every sashimi is a dish.
stalactite is a kind of cylinder.
boarding and embarkation mean the same thing.
A admonition is also called a monition.
doorkeeper is a synonym of ostiary.
Every gallop is a gait.
siccative is a kind of chemical agent.
People in Alpinia pay with Alpini.
Arcadia uses the Drachma as its currency.
Sokovia uses the Koruna as its currency.
The currency of Uberwald is the Gulden.
President Kaznov governs Kaznia.
President Mordov governs Mordavia.
Klatch is led by President Seriph.
Verdania uses the Verdani as its currency.
In Zlobenia, the capital is Zlobengrad.
The Monte is used in Montero.

for i in range(10):
    print(i)
